admin_group.description: Admin group name (will have CAN_MANAGE permissions)

success_message:
✅ LiveValidator template initialized successfully!

Next steps:
  1. cd LiveValidator
  2. databricks bundle deploy -t {{.target_name}}
  3. databricks apps start live-validator -t {{.target_name}}
  4. Open the app URL and complete setup

See README.md for detailed instructions.
